attributes.description: AWS RDS dashboard for CloudWatch metrics collected by the OpenTelemetry Collector.
attributes.title: [AWS OTel] RDS

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor AWS RDS database instances across your fleet in real time.
Filter by DB instance at the top. Spot saturated CPU, idle databases, and storage outliers in the summary table — click any database to drill down.
To get started, instrument your RDS instances with the AWS integration.

embeddableConfig.title: Database count over time
embeddableConfig.description: Count of RDS databases over time, classified per time bucket by health — saturated (CPU > 80%), low-storage (free storage < 5 GiB), idle (no connections), or healthy. A rising saturated series indicates spreading CPU pressure.

attributes.title: Database count over time
attributes.description: Count of RDS databases over time, classified per time bucket by health — saturated (CPU > 80%), low-storage (free storage < 5 GiB), idle (no connections), or healthy. A rising saturated series indicates spreading CPU pressure.

query.esql: TS metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Minimum") | STATS b_cpu = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL))), b_storage = MIN(min_over_time(CASE(stat == "Minimum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))), b_conn = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE( b_cpu > 80, "saturated", b_storage < 5368709120, "low_storage", b_conn == 0 OR b_conn IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | STATS total = COUNT(*), saturated = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "saturated", low_storage = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "low_storage", healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy", idle = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "idle" BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

TS metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Minimum") | STATS b_cpu = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL))), b_storage = MIN(min_over_time(CASE(stat == "Minimum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))), b_conn = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE( b_cpu > 80, "saturated", b_storage < 5368709120, "low_storage", b_conn == 0 OR b_conn IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | STATS total = COUNT(*), saturated = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "saturated", low_storage = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "low_storage", healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy", idle = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "idle" BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Databases
embeddableConfig.description: All RDS databases, ranked worst-first by state. Click a database to drill into its metrics. State reflects the latest values within a 5-minute freshness window. Avg CPU, read/write latency, and IOPS are averaged over the selected time range; free memory, free storage, and connections are current (last) values.

attributes.title: Databases
attributes.description: All RDS databases, ranked worst-first by state. Click a database to drill into its metrics. State reflects the latest values within a 5-minute freshness window. Avg CPU, read/write latency, and IOPS are averaged over the selected time range; free memory, free storage, and connections are current (last) values.

query.esql: TS metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" AND stat IN ("Average", "Maximum", "Minimum") | STATS c_cpu_max = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL))), c_conn_max = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))), c_storage_min = MIN(min_over_time(CASE(stat == "Minimum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))), c_cpu = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL))) / 100.0, c_conn = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))), c_mem = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory`, NULL))), c_storage = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))), c_read_iops = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadIOPS`, NULL))), c_write_iops = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteIOPS`, NULL))), c_read_lat = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadLatency`, NULL))) * 1000, c_write_lat = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteLatency`, NULL))) * 1000 BY DBInstanceIdentifier, c_account = cloud.account.id, c_region = cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE( c_cpu_max > 80, 1, c_storage_min < 5368709120, 2, c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, 3, 4), c_state = CASE( c_cpu_max > 80, "saturated", c_storage_min < 5368709120, "low-storage", c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

TS metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" AND stat IN ("Average", "Maximum", "Minimum") | STATS c_cpu_max = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL))), c_conn_max = MAX(max_over_time(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))), c_storage_min = MIN(min_over_time(CASE(stat == "Minimum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))), c_cpu = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL))) / 100.0, c_conn = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))), c_mem = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory`, NULL))), c_storage = MAX(last_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))), c_read_iops = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadIOPS`, NULL))), c_write_iops = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteIOPS`, NULL))), c_read_lat = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReadLatency`, NULL))) * 1000, c_write_lat = AVG(avg_over_time(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/WriteLatency`, NULL))) * 1000 BY DBInstanceIdentifier, c_account = cloud.account.id, c_region = cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE( c_cpu_max > 80, 1, c_storage_min < 5368709120, 2, c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, 3, 4), c_state = CASE( c_cpu_max > 80, "saturated", c_storage_min < 5368709120, "low-storage", c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Databases by status
embeddableConfig.description: Share of RDS databases by latest state — saturated (CPU > 80%), low-storage (free storage < 5 GiB), idle (no connections), or healthy. Uses the most recent value per database within a 5-minute freshness window.

attributes.title: Databases by status
attributes.description: Share of RDS databases by latest state — saturated (CPU > 80%), low-storage (free storage < 5 GiB), idle (no connections), or healthy. Uses the most recent value per database within a 5-minute freshness window.

query.esql: FROM metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Minimum") | INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(@timestamp) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", @timestamp, latest_global) <= 5 | STATS cpu_cur = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), conn_cur = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), storage_cur = MIN(CASE(stat == "Minimum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE(cpu_cur IS NULL AND conn_cur IS NULL AND storage_cur IS NULL, "no data", cpu_cur > 80, "saturated", storage_cur < 5368709120, "low-storage", conn_cur == 0 OR conn_cur IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | STATS databases = COUNT(*) BY rds_state = state

FROM metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Maximum", "Minimum") | INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(@timestamp) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", @timestamp, latest_global) <= 5 | STATS cpu_cur = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), conn_cur = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), storage_cur = MIN(CASE(stat == "Minimum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | EVAL state = CASE(cpu_cur IS NULL AND conn_cur IS NULL AND storage_cur IS NULL, "no data", cpu_cur > 80, "saturated", storage_cur < 5368709120, "low-storage", conn_cur == 0 OR conn_cur IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | STATS databases = COUNT(*) BY rds_state = state

query.esql: FROM metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum") | STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest = MAX(last_seen) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest) <= 5 | STATS total = COUNT(*) | KEEP total

FROM metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" | WHERE stat IN ("Average", "Maximum") | STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest = MAX(last_seen) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest) <= 5 | STATS total = COUNT(*) | KEEP total

query.esql: TS metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS metric = AVG(avg_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC, metric ASC, DBInstanceIdentifier ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

TS metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS metric = AVG(avg_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeableMemory`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC, metric ASC, DBInstanceIdentifier ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: CPU utilization
embeddableConfig.description: Average CPU utilization (%) per database over time (averaged per bucket). Reference line at 80% marks the high-CPU threshold. Top 10 databases by CPU per bucket.

attributes.title: CPU utilization
attributes.description: Average CPU utilization (%) per database over time (averaged per bucket). Reference line at 80% marks the high-CPU threshold. Top 10 databases by CPU per bucket.

query.esql: TS metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS metric = AVG(avg_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`)) / 100.0 BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC, metric DESC, DBInstanceIdentifier ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
ROW alert_threshold = 0.8

TS metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS metric = AVG(avg_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`)) / 100.0 BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC, metric DESC, DBInstanceIdentifier ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: RDS databases — hexagon map (click an hex for actions)
embeddableConfig.description: One hexagon per RDS database, ordered worst-first with CPU-saturated or low-storage databases first. Toggle Color by between Status, CPU utilization, or Free Storage; metric views support Min, Max, Avg, and Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that database.

query.esql: TS metrics-aws.rds.otel-* | WHERE DBInstanceIdentifier IS NOT NULL AND DBInstanceIdentifier != "" | WHERE stat == "Average" AND (`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/NetworkReceiveThroughput` IS NOT NULL OR `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/NetworkTransmitThroughput` IS NOT NULL) | STATS col_ni = AVG(avg_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/NetworkReceiveThroughput`)) / 1048576.0 BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region | WHERE col_ni IS NOT NULL | SORT timestamp ASC, col_ni DESC, DBInstanceIdentifier ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
